pages.text: A true mountain — a tall, peaked Rocky island that rises well above its rim, far larger and richer than the standard isle.

$(bold)Mountain riches$()$(br)The deep core carries the full Rocky ore suite — $(item)iron$() and $(item)copper$() in abundance, coal, lapis and gold — and being a mountain it also yields $(item)emerald ore$(), the reliable source for the trading economy. Goats roam the heights.

$(bold)Height matters$()$(br)Thrown high, or over a snowy biome, it caps with snow as an alpine peak; thrown deep near the world's floor it forms from $(item)deepslate$(), rich in diamond; in between, bare stone and scree.
